items.title: Velvet Espresso
items.description: A concentrated single-origin shot with caramel crema and deep cocoa notes.

items.title: Golden Americano
items.description: Smooth espresso lengthened with hot filtered water for a clean, rounded finish.

items.title: Cloud Cappuccino
items.description: Balanced espresso, steamed milk, and a plush foam cap dusted with cacao.

items.title: Honey Oat Latte
items.description: Oat milk latte finished with wildflower honey and a whisper of cinnamon.

items.title: Midnight Mocha
items.description: House chocolate ganache folded into espresso and silky steamed milk.

items.title: Amber Cold Brew
items.description: Eighteen-hour steeped coffee served over clear ice with brown sugar aromatics.

items.title: Iced Vanilla Latte
items.description: Chilled espresso, vanilla bean syrup, and milk poured over hand-cut ice.

items.title: Caramel Cream Frappe
items.description: Blended coffee, caramel, milk, and cream with a soft salted finish.

items.title: Butter Croissant
items.description: Flaky slow-fermented pastry baked until golden and served warm.

items.title: Avocado Sourdough
items.description: Crushed avocado, lemon, chili flakes, and herbs on toasted sourdough.

items.title: Maple Mini Pancakes
items.description: Stacked buttermilk pancakes with maple butter and toasted pecans.

items.title: Sesame Cream Bagel
items.description: Toasted sesame bagel with whipped cream cheese and micro greens.

items.title: Espresso Tiramisu
items.description: Mascarpone cream layered with espresso-soaked sponge and dark cocoa.

items.title: Walnut Brownie
items.description: Dense chocolate brownie with toasted walnuts and sea salt crystals.

items.title: Vanilla Cheesecake
items.description: Creamy vanilla cheesecake with coffee caramel drizzle.

items.title: Coffee Macarons
items.description: Almond shells filled with espresso buttercream and hazelnut praline.

items.title: Dark Chocolate Cake
items.description: Layered chocolate sponge, mocha cream, and glossy ganache.

items.title: Spiced Carrot Cake
items.description: Moist carrot cake with cream cheese frosting and toasted spices.

items.title: Berry Coffee Spritz
items.description: Cold brew, berry reduction, citrus, and sparkling water over ice.

items.title: Citrus Mint Cooler
items.description: Orange, lemon, mint, and tonic with a delicate espresso mist.
